title: Acaiberry Powder
desc:
Acai berries are widely regarded as a “superfood” thanks to their exceptionally high antioxidant levels — including anthocyanins, polyphenols, and carotenoids. Along with antioxidants, they deliver essential nutrients such as amino acids, dietary fiber, calcium, iron, and vitamin E.
Drymac’s Acai Berry Powder makes these nutrients available in a convenient, shelf-stable format that blends easily with foods and beverages. Its portability and ease of use make it a popular choice for nutraceuticals, functional foods, and sports nutrition.

title: Aloevera Powder
desc:
Aloe Vera Powder is produced from the spray-dried inner gel of the aloe leaf, resulting in a free-flowing, white to light beige, fine powder with a mild herbal aroma that is soluble in water. Aloe vera is traditionally valued for its gentle interaction with the digestive system and is commonly included in food and supplement formulations for this reason.
As a concentrated form of aloe vera gel, the powder naturally contains salicylates, antioxidants, vitamin C, and essential minerals. These naturally occurring components are widely associated, in a general non-medical sense, with skin-soothing characteristics and wellness-oriented applications. The powder is water-soluble and is widely used across food, personal care, cosmetic, health food, and beverage industries.

title: Amla Powder
desc:
It is produced from fresh amla (Indian gooseberry) juice and is valued for its naturally sour and slightly bitter flavor profile. Traditionally used in Indian households as a fruit, in pickles, medicinal preparations, and everyday cooking, amla is widely recognized for its nutritional richness. It naturally contains phosphorus, iron, fiber, protein, carbohydrates, and is especially known for its high vitamin C content.
In a general, non-medical sense, amla is commonly associated with wellness, beauty care, and nutrition-focused applications. Its versatile nutritional profile allows it to be used across a wide range of culinary, personal care, and supplementary product formulations.

title: Annatto Color - Powder & Liquid
desc:
Available in both Bixin (oil-soluble) and Norbixin (water-soluble) forms, annatto color offers excellent flexibility across fat-based and aqueous formulations. It is produced in powder and liquid formats to suit diverse processing needs while delivering consistent color strength, uniform dispersion, and reliable batch-to-batch performance.
Annatto color is valued for its strong heat, light, and pH stability, making it suitable for applications involving thermal processing and extended shelf life. It is plant-derived, vegetarian-friendly, and globally accepted for use in a wide range of commercial food products.
A. Powder
B. Liquid
Bixin (Oil-Soluble)
Applications
Norbixin (Water-Soluble)
Applications

title: Apple (Green) Powder
desc:
Green apple powder combines the refreshing taste of fresh apples with the convenience of a shelf-stable, easy-to-use format. Known for its tangy flavor and nutritional profile, it provides vitamins, antioxidants, and fiber that support digestion and overall wellness.
Drymac’s Green Apple Powder dissolves quickly in water, blends smoothly, and retains its authentic apple character. Its versatility makes it a popular choice across food and beverage manufacturing, nutraceuticals, and functional foods.

title: Apple Cider Vinegar Powder
desc:
Apple Cider Vinegar Powder is produced from fermented apple juice made by crushing fresh apples and extracting their juice. Traditionally used in chutneys, vinaigrettes, marinades, and salad dressings, it delivers the familiar tangy profile of apple cider vinegar in a convenient dry format.
Made from apples of the Malus domestica (and related Malus species) tree, this fine, cream-colored, free-flowing powder contains naturally occurring acetic acid along with other apple-derived components. In a general, non-medical sense, it is widely used in food, personal care, and cosmetic formulations due to its versatility, ease of handling, and formulation stability.

title: Apple Powder
desc:
Drymac’s Apple Powder delivers the authentic flavor, nutrients, and aroma of fresh apples in a shelf-stable powdered form. It blends easily, dissolves quickly, and retains the fruit’s natural sweetness and tart balance.
Packed with antioxidants, dietary fiber, and natural sugars, Apple Powder supports both flavor enhancement and functional nutrition. It’s widely used in instant mixes, beverages, bakery items, and nutraceutical products for its versatility and consistent performance.
Our apple powder ensures uniform taste, easy solubility, and a smooth texture — making it an excellent choice for both health-focused and indulgent formulations.

title: Ash Gourd Powder
desc:
Traditionally valued for its cooling and hydrating properties, ash gourd powder is naturally rich in dietary fiber, vitamin C, and essential minerals. Its light, neutral profile makes it suitable for formulations aimed at digestive wellness and daily nutrition.
The spray-drying process results in a fine, free-flowing powder with good solubility and consistent performance. It blends smoothly into both dry and liquid systems, making it ideal for nutraceuticals, beverages, instant mixes, and Ayurvedic applications.

title: Avocado Powder
desc:
Avocado powder captures the nutrient-rich profile of fresh avocados — including vitamins C, E, K, and B6, along with potassium, magnesium, and heart-healthy fats. It retains the smooth texture and mild, buttery flavor of the fruit, making it ideal for both savory and sweet preparations.
This spray-dried form offers a convenient, shelf-stable alternative to fresh avocados. It blends easily, rehydrates smoothly, and delivers consistent color, flavor, and nutrition.

title: Beetroot Color Powder - Natural Red Food Color
desc:
Produced through careful processing of beetroot extracts, this color powder offers excellent dispersibility and uniform coloring strength. Its vibrant hue makes it suitable for both dry and semi-dry formulations where natural visual appeal is essential.
Beetroot color is valued for its plant-based origin, consumer acceptance, and compatibility with clean-label formulations. It integrates easily into a wide range of applications while maintaining consistent performance under standard food processing conditions.

title: Beetroot Powder
desc:
Beetroot powder is appreciated for its versatile flavor and its naturally occurring nutrients, including vitamins, minerals, and plant-derived nitrates that are inherent to fresh beets. These components are commonly associated with supporting general wellness, and the powder allows formulators to use beet characteristics in both sweet and savory applications.
It contains both soluble and insoluble fiber and is well suited for consumers seeking a plant-based, naturally derived ingredient. Its vibrant natural pigmentation also makes it a popular option for clean-label coloring in food applications.

title: Bitter Gourd powder
desc:
Bitter gourd powder retains the vegetable’s naturally bitter flavor, along with its inherent nutrient profile, while offering good solubility and flowability. The spray-drying process allows the characteristic taste and attributes of bitter gourd to be incorporated into dry blends and food applications.
Bitter gourd fruit is known for containing proteins, vitamins, and minerals common to cucurbit vegetables. The powder format allows its naturally occurring components to be used in foods, beverages, herbal preparations, and cosmetic formulations.

title: Black Currant Powder
desc:
Black currant powder is rich in vitamins A, B1, B5, B6, and E, and is particularly notable for its exceptionally high vitamin C content—significantly higher than that of oranges. Known for its vibrant berry character, the powder retains the bold, fruity sharpness of fresh black currants, making it both nutritious and refreshing.
Black currants are also recognized for their naturally high antioxidant levels. Spray-dried black currant powder offers a convenient way to incorporate this robust berry flavor into a wide range of applications, adding brightness and depth to both everyday foods and specialty recipes.

title: Black Grapes Powder
desc:
Drymac’s Black Grapes Powder captures the authentic taste and aroma of natural black grapes in a stable, easy-to-use powdered format. Produced from fresh black grape juice through gentle spray drying, it preserves the fruit’s natural compounds, including polyphenols and antioxidants known for their wellness benefits.
The powder dissolves smoothly, offers excellent dispersibility, and delivers both fruity flavor and functional color. Its vibrant profile makes it suitable for applications ranging from instant beverages and confectionery to bakery mixes, snacks, and nutraceutical formulations.

title: Blackberry Powder
desc:
This spray-dried blackberry powder delivers a consistent blackberry profile with excellent solubility and uniform particle size, making it ideal for use in instant mixes, beverages, and dry formulations. The powder is designed to blend easily and provide stable color and flavor performance across various applications, while offering improved shelf life compared to fresh fruit or liquid formats.
Blackberry powder naturally contains fruit-derived compounds, including organic acids, polyphenols, and anthocyanins that contribute to its deep purple color and characteristic aroma. As a concentrated fruit ingredient, it allows formulators to incorporate authentic blackberry attributes into products without the handling challenges associated with fresh fruit or juice.

title: Blueberry Powder
desc:
Drymac’s Blueberry Powder offers a naturally fruity, pulpy aroma and a vibrant berry profile derived from fresh blueberry crush. The powder retains the natural goodness of real blueberries, which are known to contain nutritive components that support general heart and brain well-being.
Rich in natural fibers, vitamin C, and electrolytes found in blueberries, the powder brings both flavor and functional value to a wide range of formulations. It also contains prebiotics, contributing to overall digestive wellness. With excellent heat stability, it performs reliably in baked goods, dry mixes, and nutraceutical applications.
Blueberry Powder blends smoothly, disperses well, and enhances recipes with its characteristic berry taste—making it suitable for beverages, protein mixes, confectionery products, dairy applications, and more.

title: Bottle Gourd Powder
desc:
Naturally rich in dietary fiber and vitamin C, bottle gourd powder is valued for its light, neutral flavor and clean-label appeal. Its gentle profile makes it suitable for nutritional applications where subtle taste and easy digestibility are important.
With excellent solubility and a fine, free-flowing texture, this spray-dried powder blends smoothly into dry and liquid formulations. It supports consistent processing performance and is well-suited for health drinks, instant mixes, and traditional wellness blends.

title: Broccoli Powder
desc:
Broccoli naturally contains glucoraphanin, a sulfur-containing phytochemical that can be converted into sulforaphane through typical biochemical processes. Broccoli is widely recognized for providing vitamins, minerals, fiber, and naturally occurring antioxidants, and the powder form offers a convenient way to incorporate these components into dry mixes and food applications.
Broccoli Powder can be used to supplement recipes where powdered greens are desired. Its natural nutrient profile, mild flavor, and fine texture make it suitable for a variety of food, beverage, and culinary applications.

title: Butter Powder
desc:
Butter Powder is produced from authentic sweet cream butter by removing its water content through a controlled dehydration process, resulting in a fine, free-flowing powder. Compared to regular butter, the powdered form offers improved shelf stability and does not require refrigeration. An antioxidant is added to help maintain freshness over time.
While butter and butter powder differ slightly in nutritional composition, the powder format is commonly noted for its ease of storage, longer usability, and flexible application across food processing. Owing to its convenience and stability, butter powder is increasingly used across multiple food sectors as a dry alternative to traditional butter.

title: Cabbage Powder
desc:
Cabbage naturally contains vitamin C, vitamin K, potassium, and dietary fiber, and the spray-dried powder helps retain these inherent components. It offers a mild vegetable profile and integrates easily into both dry mixes and ready-to-prepare foods, making it suitable for users who prefer cabbage’s benefits in a more versatile form.
Cabbage Powder can be incorporated into a range of applications for added vegetable solids, flavor enhancement, or convenience. Its fine texture also makes it an ideal ingredient for various instant, culinary, and functional formulations.

title: Capsicum Powder
desc:
Capsicum is known to provide several naturally occurring vitamins and minerals, including vitamin C, vitamin K1, vitamin E, folate, potassium, and magnesium. It also contains carotenoids and other antioxidant compounds that contribute to its functional characteristics in food products.
The powder captures the typical green capsicum flavor while offering ease of use in dry blends, seasonings, and culinary applications. Its mild pungency and aroma allow it to serve as a flavor-building ingredient across cuisines, including everyday home cooking and commercial food formulations.

title: Caramel Color (Powder & Liquid Forms)
desc:
Known for its consistent coloring strength and reliable performance, caramel color is suitable for a broad range of formulations including beverages, bakery products, confectionery, sauces, seasonings, and processed foods. It maintains color integrity under heat, acidic conditions, and various processing environments, making it a preferred choice for commercial food manufacturing.
The product is available in both powder and liquid forms to suit different application needs. The powder form is free-flowing and ideal for dry blends and bakery mixes, while the liquid form offers quick dispersion and strong color intensity for beverages and liquid-based formulations. Both forms ensure uniform batch-to-batch results, long shelf life, and ease of use.
Powder Form Applications
Liquid Form Applications

title: Carrot Powder
desc:
Carrot powder contains beta-carotene and naturally occurring vitamins such as A, B1, B2, B3, B6, C, E, and K. It also provides minerals including calcium, iron, potassium, phosphorus, and magnesium. Designed to be mild in flavor and nutrient-dense, carrot powder can be incorporated smoothly into many formulations. It is also used in a variety of food, beverage, and supplement applications due to its versatility and ease of handling.
Carrot powder can be used across a wide range of products, including smoothies, baked goods, confectionery items, gravies, stews, and other culinary preparations. Its mild, slightly sweet flavor integrates well into mixes, sauces, tonics, desserts, snacks, dressings, and general cooking. As an additional ingredient, carrot powder offers a convenient way to include the characteristic taste and nutritional components of carrots in product development.

title: Cauliflower Powder
desc:
This spray-dried cauliflower powder offers a convenient way to incorporate the nutritional benefits of cauliflower into a wide range of food applications. Naturally rich in dietary fiber, vitamin C, and antioxidants, it supports the development of wholesome and balanced food products without altering the original flavor profile.
Its fine texture and free-flowing nature allow for easy blending and uniform dispersion across dry and liquid systems. Commonly used in soups, sauces, snacks, bakery mixes, and ready-to-cook products, cauliflower powder is especially popular in keto-friendly, low-carb, and clean-label formulations.

title: Cheddar Cheese Powder
desc:
Cheddar Cheese Powder is produced from regular cheddar cheese using a controlled spray-drying process to create a smooth, free-flowing, and flavorful powder. It delivers the characteristic rich, creamy, and sharp cheddar taste in a convenient dry format that blends easily into various formulations.
Cheddar cheese naturally contains calcium, protein, phosphorus, zinc, vitamin A, vitamin B12, vitamin K, and fat, contributing to its nutritional profile. The powdered form offers consistent flavor delivery, improved shelf stability, and easy handling, making it a practical ingredient for a wide range of food and snack applications where authentic cheddar flavor is desired.

title: Cheese Powder
desc:
Cheese Powder is made from cheese cultures, salt, and other cheese-derived ingredients to deliver the characteristic taste of fresh cheese in a convenient dry format. Although it lacks the moisture of regular cheese, it closely replicates traditional cheesy flavor and aroma.
Its versatility and availability in multiple flavor variations have contributed to its widespread use in food and snack applications. Cheese powder is also valued for its nutritional profile, as cheese naturally contains calcium and protein. In bakery and processed food applications, the powdered format supports longer shelf life, consistent blending, and easy incorporation across a variety of products.

title: Cherry Powder
desc:
This cherry powder delivers a clean, fruity cherry profile along with a naturally appealing pinkish-red color, making it suitable for both flavoring and visual enhancement in finished products. Its free-flowing nature and good solubility support ease of handling during processing and consistent dispersion in dry and liquid applications.
Designed for commercial use, spray-dried cherry powder offers stability and uniform particle size, helping maintain batch-to-batch consistency. Its versatility makes it well-suited for use across beverages, confectionery, dairy, and functional food formulations where authentic cherry character is desired.

title: Chicory Powder
desc:
Chicory Powder is produced by roasting and finely grinding the roots, buds, or leaves of the chicory plant. When blended with coffee, it adds color, body, and a fuller mouthfeel to the beverage and has long been used in traditional South Indian filter coffee preparations.
Chicory root powder is naturally caffeine-free and is widely used as a coffee alternative or blending ingredient. It is also known to contain dietary fiber and is traditionally associated, in a general non-medical sense, with digestion-friendly food applications. Its warm, slightly bitter profile makes it suitable for both beverage and culinary use.

title: Chikoo Powder
desc:
Chikoo Powder is a naturally sweet, light brown powder made from fresh chikoo pulp. It delivers the characteristic flavor and aroma of the fruit and blends easily into dry and liquid formulations due to its free-flowing, water-soluble nature.
Chikoo is known to contain polyphenols, including tannins, as well as dietary fiber, vitamins, and minerals. These natural components are associated with general digestive comfort and overall wellness, making the powder suitable for nutraceutical and functional product development. Its smooth sweetness and authentic fruitiness make it simple to enhance the flavor and appeal of beverages, instant mixes, desserts, and other applications.

title: Coconut Milk Vegan Powder
desc:
This vegan coconut milk powder delivers the natural richness, aroma, and mouthfeel of coconut milk while offering the convenience of a shelf-stable, free-flowing powder. Its clean-label formulation makes it ideal for manufacturers seeking dairy-free and allergen-friendly solutions without compromising on taste or texture.
With consistent flowability and easy dispersibility, the powder integrates seamlessly into hot and cold applications. It is widely used in beverages, bakery products, desserts, curries, gravies, nutraceutical blends, and functional foods, supporting a broad range of vegan and plant-based formulations.

title: Coriander Powder
desc:
Coriander leaves naturally contain antioxidants and vitamins, including vitamin C and provitamin A carotenoids, along with dietary fiber. In powder form, the characteristic fresh-leaf flavor is retained, making it a convenient way to add coriander’s aromatic profile to a wide range of recipes. Since it is typically used in small culinary quantities, the powder integrates easily without overpowering dishes.
Spray-dried coriander powder is valued for its clean aroma and versatility. It blends well into seasonings, mixes, condiments, and prepared foods, offering a quick-dissolving form that distributes flavor evenly. Its refreshing, herbaceous character enhances both traditional and contemporary formulations.

title: Cranberry Powder
desc:
Cranberry powder delivers the authentic taste and natural acidity of cranberries in a highly stable, easy-to-handle format. It provides a bright pink-red hue and clean cranberry profile, making it well-suited for applications where both flavor impact and visual appeal are important. The spray-drying process ensures good solubility and consistent particle size, allowing for uniform dispersion in dry blends and liquid systems.
Naturally rich in plant compounds and organic acids, cranberry powder is widely used in functional and wellness-oriented products. Its strong antioxidant association and refreshing tartness make it a popular ingredient in health-focused formulations, beverages, and supplements, as well as in bakery, dairy, and confectionery applications requiring a natural fruit note.

title: Cream Powder
desc:
Cream Powder is made from pasteurized fresh milk that is concentrated, standardized for fat content, and spray-dried into a naturally rich, free-flowing powder. Produced from a blend of fresh dairy cream and skim milk, it delivers the characteristic creamy taste and dairy profile of liquid cream in a convenient dry format.
Cream powder is widely used in food processing because it blends easily, enhances richness, and provides a consistent creamy flavor in baked goods, ice creams, soups, sauces, chocolates, and desserts. Cream naturally contains fat and other dairy components that contribute to its culinary versatility and traditional use in a variety of food applications.

title: Cucumber Powder
desc:
Cucumber Powder offers the natural taste and aroma of fresh cucumber in a convenient, shelf-stable format. Cucumbers inherently contain nutrients such as vitamin K, vitamin C, potassium, magnesium, phosphorus, folate, and small amounts of other trace minerals. The spray-drying process helps preserve key sensory attributes while ensuring good solubility and flow characteristics.
Its clean, refreshing profile makes it suitable for seasoning mixes, dips, sauces, dressings, dry blends, and various food applications. The powder can also be used in cosmetic and personal-care formulations where natural cucumber aroma notes or plant-based ingredients are desired.

title: Curcumin Color
desc:
Available in both powder and liquid forms , curcumin color offers strong coloring strength, excellent stability, and uniform dispersion in a wide range of formulations. It is suitable for dry mixes as well as liquid systems, ensuring flexibility for different processing requirements.
Curcumin color is valued not only for its vibrant appearance but also for its natural origin and broad acceptance in vegetarian and vegan foods. With good heat and pH stability, it performs reliably in processed foods, beverages, and functional formulations.
1. Curcumin Powder
2. Curcumin Liquid
Curcumin Powder Applications
Curcumin Liquid Applications

title: Curd Powder
desc:
Spray-Dried Curd Powder is produced from fermented milk, traditionally known as dahi in India, which is widely consumed as part of daily meals and beverages across the country. Through a controlled spray-drying process, fresh curd is converted into a cream-colored, free-flowing powder that retains the characteristic tangy, mildly salty flavor and appearance of fresh curd.
The powder is smooth, uniform, and free from lumps, making it easy to blend into various formulations. Curd naturally contains nutrients such as calcium, potassium, vitamin B12, iodine, and phosphorus, and is traditionally associated, in a general non-medical sense, with digestive-friendly and nutrition-focused food applications.

title: Custard Apple Powder
desc:
Custard Apple Powder is made by converting fresh pulp into a smooth concentrate and spray-drying it to preserve the fruit’s characteristic flavor and aroma. The resulting powder has a soft, fine texture and blends easily into a wide range of dry mixes and beverage systems.
This powder is fortified with vitamins and minerals, including nutrients such as calcium, magnesium, iron, potassium, copper, vitamin C, vitamin A, and B-vitamins (including B12). These added nutrients complement the fruit’s natural nutritional profile, offering an ingredient that supports general wellness while delivering the pleasant sweetness and aroma of custard apple in a convenient, shelf-stable format.

title: Date Sugar (From Dry Dates)
desc:
This naturally derived sugar offers a warm, caramel-like sweetness with a subtle fruity aroma, closely resembling the flavor profile of whole dates. Its minimally processed nature makes it suitable for applications where nutritional value and ingredient transparency are important.
Date sugar blends well into dry mixes and formulations, providing sweetness along with functional nutritional benefits. It is widely used in bakery products, beverages, breakfast cereals, and functional foods as a natural sugar replacement without the need for additives or preservatives.

title: Dates Powder
desc:
Dates Powder is a fine, free-flowing powder that retains the natural color and typical fruity sweetness of dates while offering excellent solubility and ease of blending across formulations.
The powder naturally contains minerals such as potassium, magnesium, copper, and trace amounts of iron, calcium, phosphorus, niacin, and vitamin B6. It also contributes dietary fiber, supporting overall wellness and formulation functionality. Its fine texture helps achieve smooth, lump-free dispersibility in dry mixes, beverages, and bakery systems.

title: Dragon Fruit Powder
desc:
Drymac’s Dragon Fruit Powder is a bright pink, fine-textured powder with the natural flavor and aroma of dragon fruit. Produced through spray drying, it captures the fruit’s characteristic qualities, including its mild sweetness and naturally present plant compounds such as flavonoids and other phytonutrients.
Rich in natural fiber and nutrients found in dragon fruit—including vitamin C, B vitamins, iron, and magnesium—the powder offers a pleasantly neutral, lightly sweet taste that blends well into a variety of products. Its vibrant color makes it ideal for enhancing appearance, while its versatile profile allows it to be used in beverages, baked goods, desserts, and more.

title: Garlic Powder
desc:
Garlic Powder provides the distinct aroma and sharp, savory profile of fresh garlic in a stable, easy-to-handle powdered form. Spray drying helps preserve key flavor compounds while delivering excellent dispersibility, making it suitable for dry seasoning blends, ready-mix formulations, and processed foods. Garlic naturally contains nutrients such as vitamin B6, vitamin C, manganese, and trace minerals, though levels may vary depending on processing.
Its robust and versatile flavor makes it widely used in spice blends, sauces, condiments, gravies, and bakery applications. The powdered format ensures uniform distribution, simplified storage, and consistent flavor performance across culinary and industrial processes.

title: Ginger Powder
desc:
Spray Dried Ginger Powder provides the authentic flavor profile of fresh ginger with the convenience of a stable, easy-to-use powder. Because moisture content is significantly reduced during processing, the powder becomes light, dispersible, and suitable for applications where solubility and consistency are important—such as instant mixes, beverages, masalas, and seasoning blends.
Ginger naturally contains bioactive compounds like gingerols and shogaols, known for their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. While processing may alter exact nutrient levels, ginger powder is still valued in nutraceuticals and traditional herbal preparations for its warming profile, digestive support, and potential role in reducing exercise-related muscle soreness. Its versatility makes it suitable for foods, beverages, supplements, and functional formulations.

title: Green Chilli Powder
desc:
Spray Dried Green Chilli Powder preserves the fiery taste of fresh green chillies while providing the convenience of a shelf-stable ingredient. Its smooth texture and excellent dispersibility make it suitable for snacks, instant foods, gravies, masalas, and a wide range of industrial formulations. This powdered form is especially valuable when uniform heat, controlled pungency, and easy incorporation are required.
Green chillies naturally contain vitamin C, carotenoids, and certain phytonutrients, though their nutrient levels vary. Nevertheless, green chilli powder remains valued for adding heat, flavor depth, and freshness to dishes. It is widely used in cuisines that rely on spicy profiles—notably Indian, Thai, and Mexican—making it a versatile component across global food categories.

title: Green Fennel Powder
desc:
Green Fennel Powder is produced by finely grinding fresh green fennel into a smooth, aromatic powder that is widely used as a natural flavor enhancer. Also known as saunf powder, it is valued for its refreshing, mildly sweet taste and pleasant aroma.
Fennel naturally contains vitamins, minerals, flavonoids, polyphenols, and antioxidants, along with naturally occurring essential oils that contribute to its distinctive flavor profile. In a general, non-medical sense, fennel is traditionally associated with digestion-friendly and wellness-oriented uses. Owing to its nutritional composition and versatile taste, green fennel powder is used across culinary, food processing, and traditional wellness applications.

title: Green Grapes Powder
desc:
Green grapes powder offers a clean, naturally sweet grape profile with a mild, refreshing taste, making it ideal for applications requiring subtle fruit notes and a smooth mouthfeel. The spray-drying process ensures uniform particle size, good solubility, and consistent performance across dry blends and liquid systems. Its light green color adds visual appeal while maintaining formulation stability.
Naturally containing sugars, organic acids, and plant-derived compounds found in grapes, this powder is widely used in functional beverages, health-oriented products, and confectionery applications. Its ease of handling, long shelf life, and versatility make it suitable for both small-scale and large-scale commercial food manufacturing.

title: Green Mango-Amchur Powder
desc:
Naturally rich in vitamin C, antioxidants, and organic fruit acids, amchur powder provides both flavor intensity and functional versatility in clean-label formulations. Its bright, tart taste makes it a preferred souring agent in spice blends, snacks, and traditional recipes without adding moisture.
With a fine, free-flowing texture and consistent flavor strength, amchur powder blends easily into dry mixes and prepared foods. It offers a convenient, shelf-stable alternative to fresh or liquid souring ingredients, ensuring uniform taste and ease of handling in commercial food processing.

title: Groundnut HVP Powder
desc:
Carefully processed to retain strong flavor-enhancing properties, Groundnut HVP Powder provides depth, richness, and a distinctive nutty undertone that elevates overall taste perception. Its balanced savory profile helps round off flavors and improve mouthfeel in a wide range of food applications.
The powder is fine, free-flowing, with excellent stability and solubility, ensuring easy incorporation into both dry and wet formulations. Suitable for vegetarian recipes, it serves as a cost-efficient and clean-label alternative to MSG for manufacturers seeking consistent flavor performance.

title: Guava Powder (Pink)
desc:
Spray-dried pink guava powder functions as both a natural sweetening component and a flavoring agent. It helps enhance the nutritional and functional profile of finished products while delivering the characteristic tropical notes of pink guava. Its smooth solubility makes it suitable for fruit custards, ice creams, yogurts, and applications that require additional fruit solids in instant drinks and flavored beverages.
This powder is valued not only for its flavor but also for its nutrient content, including vitamin C and folate, which support general wellness. Its ease of use and consistency make it ideal for manufacturers looking to incorporate natural fruit identity into formulations without handling fresh fruit.

title: Guava Powder (White)
desc:
Spray-dried white guava powder functions as both a natural sweetener and flavoring agent, delivering the characteristic mellow, fruity profile of white guava. Its nutritional attributes add value to a variety of applications, and it integrates seamlessly into recipes that require fruit solids, including custards, ice creams, yogurts, and flavor-enhanced beverage mixes.
White guava powder is versatile and easy to use, adding gentle sweetness and enhancing the overall body and aroma in formulations. Naturally occurring nutrients found in guava—such as folate—contribute to its functional appeal. It supports the creation of smooth, stable mixtures and is suitable for applications ranging from bakery items to dairy-based products.

title: Honey Powder
desc:
Honey Powder is produced by spray-drying fresh liquid honey at high temperatures to convert it into a stable, free-flowing powder, often referred to as “dry honey.” It retains the mild aroma, floral-nutty sweetness, and characteristic flavor profile of liquid honey, with the primary difference being its powdered texture. When water is added, the powder can be reconstituted back into liquid honey form.
Honey naturally contains phenolic acids, flavonoids, proteins, enzymes, amino acids, vitamins, and minerals, which are commonly associated, in a general non-medical sense, with antioxidant and prebiotic characteristics. The powdered format offers improved handling, moisture management, and formulation stability across a wide range of food applications.

title: Instant Coconut Water Powder - Natural Hydration Drink
desc:
Formulated for quick reconstitution, this powder delivers a light, refreshing coconut water taste with excellent solubility in cold water. It is rich in naturally occurring electrolytes such as potassium and sodium, making it suitable for daily hydration, travel, and active lifestyles.
Designed for ease of use and consistent quality, Instant Coconut Water Powder requires no preparation beyond simple mixing. Its clean-label profile and refreshing character make it suitable for consumers of all age groups seeking a convenient hydration solution.
Mix 10–15 g of powder in a glass of chilled water and stir well.

title: Jackfruit Powder
desc:
Drymac’s Jackfruit Powder is crafted from fresh jackfruit that is converted into a fine, spray-dried powder while retaining the fruit’s characteristic taste and aroma. It offers a mild flavor, making it easy to incorporate into both sweet and savory preparations without overpowering other ingredients.
Jackfruit naturally contains dietary fiber along with vitamins and minerals such as vitamin C and B-complex nutrients. The powder provides a convenient way to introduce the fruit’s inherent nutritional characteristics into everyday foods. Its neutral, adaptable taste makes it suitable for traditional and modern recipes, whether used in flour blends, ethnic foods, or contemporary beverages and desserts.

title: Jalapeno Chilli Powder
desc:
Spray-dried from fresh jalapeno peppers, this powder delivers the distinct taste of jalapenos without the moisture of fresh produce—ideal for applications where consistency, longer shelf life, and easy incorporation are essential. Its smooth texture disperses evenly in sauces, dry mixes, rubs, and seasonings, allowing precise control over heat levels.
Jalapenos naturally contain carotenoids, which contribute to their color and serve as precursors to vitamin A. Although nutrient levels may vary, Jalapeno powder remains valued for its balanced spiciness and flavorful depth. It is widely used across cuisines, particularly in Mexican, Tex-Mex, and Southwestern dishes, where a clean medium heat profile is preferred.

title: Jamun Powder
desc:
Our spray-dried Jamun Powder captures the nutritional richness of this traditional fruit, also known as Black Plum or Indian Blackberry. It contains essential vitamins and minerals, including vitamins A and C, folic acid, potassium, iron, and magnesium.
Jamun has long been recognized for its functional properties, and the powder format makes it easy to incorporate into a wide range of formulations. Whether used for its natural color, flavor, or nutrient content, Jamun Powder is a versatile ingredient suitable for both food and beverage applications.

title: Kiwi Powder
desc:
Produced from fresh kiwi fruit through modern spray-drying techniques, Kiwi Powder retains the characteristic flavor, aroma, and light green color of the original fruit. Its water-soluble nature makes it suitable for both dry mixes and liquid preparations. Kiwi fruit naturally contains nutrients that are often associated with supporting overall well-being.
For this reason, the powder is commonly used in nutraceutical formulations, where kiwi’s natural qualities are valued for general wellness—such as maintaining comfortable respiration, supporting healthy circulation, and contributing to balanced cholesterol levels in a broad, non-medical sense. The powder dissolves easily, making it a convenient alternative to fresh fruit in applications where stability, consistency, and ease of use are important. Kiwi Powder is used in a wide range of food, beverage, and supplement products.

title: Lemon Powder
desc:
Spray-dried from pure lemon juice, Lemon Powder delivers the tangy, citrus profile of lemons in a stable and easy-to-use form. It blends smoothly into dry mixes and dissolves readily in liquids, making it suitable for both culinary and functional applications. Lemon fruit naturally contains vitamin C and other nutrients, and in general wellness contexts, these characteristics are often associated with antioxidant activity and overall vitality in a broad, non-medical sense.
Its concentrated flavor allows developers to enhance recipes without adding moisture, which is especially useful in baking, seasonings, and dry beverage formulations. The powder brings a bright, fresh lemon taste to a variety of food, drink, and nutraceutical products.

title: Lettuce Powder
desc:
Spray-Dried Lettuce Powder provides an easy and consistent way to include the essence of fresh lettuce in food applications. Transforming the vegetable into a fine powder ensures convenience, extended shelf life, and uniform distribution in dry mixes, beverages, and processed foods. Its mild flavor and light green color make it suitable for both taste enhancement and nutritional formulation.
Fresh lettuce naturally contains several micronutrients, including vitamin K, folate, and small amounts of vitamin A and vitamin C. It is also known for its low-calorie and low-fat content. Lettuce powder remains valued for adding a vegetable component to formulations where color, mild flavor, or plant-based enrichment is desired.

title: Lime Powder
desc:
Naturally rich in vitamin C and antioxidants, lime powder adds a bright, zesty citrus note while supporting clean-label formulations. The spray-drying process ensures excellent solubility, consistent flavor delivery, and easy handling, making it ideal for both dry and liquid applications.
With its free-flowing texture and intense citrus profile, lime powder blends seamlessly into beverages, seasoning mixes, marinades, and ready-to-use products. It offers manufacturers a reliable alternative to fresh lime juice, providing uniform taste, longer shelf life, and ease of storage.

title: Litchi Powder
desc:
Litchi Powder is produced from fresh litchi pulp through a controlled spray-drying process, retaining the fruit’s distinctive sweetness and floral notes. Litchi fruit naturally contains vitamin C, B-complex vitamins, and phytonutrient flavonoids, and its characteristics are often associated with general antioxidant benefits in functional formulations. The fruit is primarily composed of water and carbohydrates, and the powder provides these natural qualities in a convenient, stable form.
It is suitable for a variety of food and beverage applications where a fresh litchi flavor profile is desired. The powder blends easily into recipes without adding moisture, making it useful for formulations that require flavor enhancement, color contribution, or fruit-based notes.

title: Mango Powder
desc:
Mango Powder is made from fresh ripe mango pulp that has been spray-dried into a fine, free-flowing powder with a naturally tangy and mildly sweet flavor. It offers a convenient way to incorporate the taste of mango into various formulations without the handling challenges of fresh fruit. Mango fruit contains vitamin A, vitamin C, vitamin B-6, beta-carotene, and other naturally occurring nutrients, and these characteristics contribute to its use in nutraceutical and functional applications in a broad, non-medical sense.
The powder provides mango flavor without affecting the consistency of recipes, making it useful across multiple food and beverage categories. Its stability and ease of incorporation allow formulators to add mango notes, color, and aroma to products while maintaining consistent texture and performance.

title: Mint Powder
desc:
Spray-Dried Mint Powder provides an easy-to-use alternative to fresh mint, ensuring year-round availability without compromising on characteristic flavor. Transforming the herb into a stable powder makes it suitable for instant mixes, dry blends, beverages, and ready-to-cook preparations. Its refreshing aroma and cooling profile make it a versatile ingredient across global cuisines.
Mint naturally contains vitamin A and small amounts of several other micronutrients. Known for its strong, fresh aroma, mint has long been used in culinary preparations, beverages, herbal blends, and seasoning mixes. Mint powder is primarily valued for flavor enhancement, sensory appeal, and convenience in both food and beverage formulations.

title: Moringa Leaf Powder
desc:
Moringa Leaves Powder is valued across the personal care, healthcare, confectionery, beverage, and tea industries for its naturally nutrient-rich profile and versatile use. It is commonly incorporated into teas, moringa juice, chikki, soup mixes, and a wide range of wholesome food applications. It is also used in skin and hair oils and in products positioned for general wellness.
The powder is made by drying and milling moringa leaves in a way that helps preserve their natural green color and nutrient density. Known for its plant-based proteins, minerals, amino acids, antioxidants, and flavonoids, moringa is traditionally associated with broad wellness-oriented benefits in a non-medical sense. Its mild taste, ease of blending, and ability to enrich both food and personal care formulations make it a widely used ingredient across multiple industries.

title: Mulberry Powder
desc:
Our Mulberry Powder serves as both a functional ingredient and a natural colorant. Its vivid purple-pink hue, good solubility, and clean flavor make it suitable for a wide range of hot and cold beverages as well as confectionery and bakery products.
Mulberries are known for their naturally occurring antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, and the powder format makes it easy to integrate their benefits into dry mixes, instant blends, and health-focused formulations. Mulberry’s natural pigment properties also allow it to act as an acid–base indicator, adding visual appeal and novelty to certain formulations.

title: Muskmelon Powder
desc:
Our Muskmelon Powder retains the characteristic creamish-orange color and sweet, refreshing aroma of ripe muskmelon. Known for its hydration-supporting properties, muskmelon is valued for its vitamins, minerals, antioxidants, and natural fiber.
This spray-dried powder delivers the goodness of the whole fruit in a stable and easy-to-use format—ideal for beverages, nutritional blends, and instant mixes. It is popularly used in formulations that aim to support digestion, skin health, and overall wellness.

title: Okra Powder
desc:
Naturally rich in fiber, essential vitamins, and antioxidants, okra powder is especially known for its excellent thickening and stabilizing ability. The natural mucilage present in okra makes it an effective ingredient for improving texture and consistency in soups, sauces, and gravies without the need for artificial additives.
With a neutral taste and fine, free-flowing texture, okra powder blends easily into a variety of applications, including health mixes, baby foods, and ready-to-cook products. It supports clean-label, gluten-free, keto-friendly, and low-calorie formulations, making it suitable for both home use and commercial food production.

title: Onion Powder
desc:
Spray-Dried Onion Powder provides the characteristic savory, pungent flavor of onions in a convenient, long-lasting format suited for both industrial and culinary use. With a more concentrated flavor than fresh onion, it works effectively in dry seasoning mixes, instant formulations, and ready-to-cook applications.
Onions naturally provide vitamin C, vitamin B6, folate, potassium, manganese, and dietary fiber. The nutrient levels in the powder may vary, but onion powder is primarily valued for its robust flavor and aroma, making it a key ingredient in numerous food products, including soups, sauces, seasonings, and blends.

title: Orange Powder
desc:
Our Orange Powder is crafted to maintain the authentic taste and nutritional value of fresh oranges, including naturally occurring vitamin C, vitamin A, and carotenoids. It dissolves easily, blends smoothly, and remains free-flowing, making it highly adaptable in both food and beverage applications.
Beyond flavor enhancement, it provides functional benefits and is ideal for manufacturers seeking a stable, versatile citrus ingredient with excellent solubility and consistent quality.

title: Passion Fruit Powder
desc:
Passion Fruit Powder offers a lively balance of sweet and sour notes that enhances a wide range of recipes. The spray-drying process preserves the fruit’s characteristic volatile aroma compounds and flavor-active constituents. Naturally rich in vitamins A and C, along with trace amounts of B-complex vitamins, it also contains beneficial minerals such as potassium, calcium, phosphorus, and magnesium.
The powder exhibits excellent solubility, stable color (yellow-orange) retention, and uniform particle size—making it suitable for both dry-blend and liquid applications. Its natural acidity and aromatic profile provide strong flavor-lifting capabilities in formulations, while its consistent flow properties support efficient handling, dosing, and integration into industrial-scale processing systems.
Food & Beverage Formulations
Culinary, Industrial & Functional Applications

title: Peach Powder
desc:
Peach Powder is manufactured by converting fresh peach juice into a stable, shelf-ready ingredient through a precision spray-drying process. This technique preserves key volatile flavor compounds while creating a fine, uniform powder with excellent solubility and dispersibility.
Because of its consistent particle structure and natural sweetness, the powder integrates seamlessly into dry blends, instant mixes, and liquid formulations. It serves as a functional flavor enhancer, providing desirable fruity notes without adding moisture, and performs well in baked goods, confections, beverages, and dairy-based systems.

title: Pineapple Powder
desc:
Drymac’s Spray Dried Pineapple Powder is produced from fresh pineapple juice using controlled low-temperature spray drying to preserve the fruit’s characteristic sweetness, acidity, and volatile flavor compounds. The powder has a uniform particle profile, good solubility, and excellent dispersibility, making it suitable for a wide range of dry-mix and wet-mix formulations.
Pineapple naturally contains dietary fiber, vitamins such as B1, B6, and C, and minerals including manganese, potassium, and magnesium. The product also contains naturally occurring pineapple enzymes, including bromelain, which may contribute functional properties in certain food systems. This combination of natural flavor, aroma, and inherent nutrient components makes the powder well-suited for beverages, confectionery, bakery mixes, and nutraceutical applications where authentic pineapple characteristics are desired.

title: Pomegranate Powder
desc:
Drymac’s Spray Dried Pomegranate Powder is manufactured by converting fresh pomegranate juice into a fine, free-flowing powder using controlled spray-drying technology. This process helps preserve the characteristic pink color, natural tart-sweet flavor, and aromatic profile of the fruit. Pomegranate naturally contains a range of phytonutrients, including vitamin C, potassium, folate, polyphenols, and fruit-derived antioxidants.
The powder retains key fruit-based polyphenols, such as punicalagin and punicic acid, which are recognized as key constituents of pomegranate. The concentration of these components reflects natural variation in fruit composition and the specific parameters used during processing. Owing to its natural pigment strength, flavor intensity, and solubility, the powder is well-suited for beverage systems, instant mixes, seasoning blends, confectionery applications, and other formulations requiring a clean-label fruit ingredient.
Beverages, Mixes & Confectionery
Culinary & Savory Applications

title: Prickly Pear Powder
desc:
This powder is valued for its naturally occurring antioxidants, including betalain pigments, along with vitamin C and dietary fiber. Its vibrant natural hue and refreshing flavor profile make it suitable for applications where both nutritional and visual appeal are important.
Spray-dried prickly pear powder offers good solubility and blending performance, allowing easy incorporation into liquid systems, dry mixes, and functional formulations. Its clean-label nature and plant-based origin make it a preferred ingredient for health drinks, nutraceuticals, herbal blends, and natural food products.

title: Pumpkin Powder
desc:
Pumpkin Powder is valued for its natural orange color, mild sweetness, and compatibility with dry and wet systems. It contains naturally occurring vitamins (including vitamin A precursors), carotenoids, pectin, amino acids such as citrulline and arginine, and minerals like potassium, iron, and magnesium. Its fine texture allows seamless integration into food mixtures that benefit from pumpkin flavor, color enhancement, or nutrient contribution.
In many recipes, Pumpkin Powder can serve as an alternative to canned or cooked pumpkin when rehydrated, while remaining easy to use in its dry form. It works effectively in bakery mixes, beverages, snacks, sauces, seasoning blends, and both sweet and savory applications. Its versatility has made it a popular choice across food manufacturing, culinary preparations, and product development.

title: Raspberry Powder
desc:
Spray-dried Raspberry Powder is made from high-quality raspberry juice and purée, which undergo a specialized pre-processing and drying sequence to preserve color, flavor, and key fruit-derived components. Raspberries naturally contain phytonutrients such as catechins, anthocyanins, and ellagic acid, along with vitamins (C, K, E) and minerals including magnesium, folate, copper, and potassium. The powder may also retain fruit-based omega-3 fatty acids present in the raw material.
The levels of these naturally occurring compounds reflect inherent variations in fruit quality and processing conditions. The result is a versatile, water-soluble ingredient that provides authentic raspberry flavor, vibrant color, and functional formulation benefits across food, beverage, and nutritional applications.
Food, Beverage & Culinary Applications
Product Development & Industrial Use

title: Ripe Banana Powder
desc:
Drymac’s Banana Powder captures the wholesome nutrition and natural flavor of fresh bananas in a spray-dried, shelf-stable form. Available in Ripe and Unripe variants, it serves a wide range of uses — from sweet bakery and beverage formulations to functional and nutraceutical products.
Rich in fiber, potassium, magnesium, and vitamins A, B6, C, and E, Banana Powder offers a natural source of energy and essential nutrients. The ripe variant delivers mild sweetness and creamy texture ideal for flavor-forward applications, while the unripe variant offers resistant starch and low sugar — perfect for functional foods and health-focused formulations.
Both varieties dissolve quickly, blend smoothly, and retain the fruit’s characteristic aroma and color — helping you achieve consistency and quality in every batch.

title: Ripe Papaya Powder
desc:
Papaya Powder is produced from fresh papaya pulp and spray-dried into a smooth, free-flowing powder that preserves the fruit’s natural flavor and aroma. The powder delivers a pleasant, mildly sweet profile, making easy to incorporate into sweet formulations without overpowering other ingredients.
Rich in naturally occurring nutrients—such as vitamins A, B, and C—proteolytic enzymes like papain and chymotrypsin, amino acids, and dietary fiber, Papaya Powder brings functional value as well as flavor. Its fine texture and good solubility make it suitable for beverages, bakery applications, ready mixes, and culinary uses where papaya’s enzymatic or tenderizing properties are desirable.

title: Rose Flavor Powder
desc:
This powder captures the authentic fragrance and delicate flavor of fresh roses, making it ideal for traditional, modern, and fusion formulations. Its refined sensory profile enhances both taste and aroma, especially in sweet and beverage-based products.
Rose flavor powder is spray-dried to ensure uniform particle size, good solubility, and long shelf life. It blends seamlessly into dry mixes and liquids, making it a reliable choice for manufacturers seeking consistent flavor delivery, clean-label options, and convenient handling.

title: Soy HVP Powder
desc:
Manufactured using carefully selected soy protein, Soy HVP Powder provides consistent flavor enhancement with excellent solubility and stability. Its meaty, savory notes help improve overall taste perception, mouthfeel, and flavor balance across a wide range of savory applications.
The fine, free-flowing powder blends easily into dry and wet formulations, supporting clean-label and plant-based product development. Suitable for vegetarian and vegan recipes, it is an essential ingredient for food manufacturers seeking reliable flavor performance and formulation efficiency.

title: Soya Sauce Powder
desc:
Soya Sauce Powder is produced by spray-drying fermented soy sauce into a fine, free-flowing, hygroscopic powder that ranges in color from yellow to light brown. It delivers the familiar salty, earthy, and umami-rich flavor of liquid soy sauce in a convenient dry format.
With origins tracing back over 2,500 years to China and later spreading across Japan, Korea, and Southeast Asia, soy sauce remains one of the world’s most widely used condiments. The powdered form offers improved shelf stability, easy handling, and consistent flavor delivery across modern food processing and culinary applications.

title: Spinach Powder
desc:
Spinach Powder is valued for its fine texture, rich green hue, and compatibility with various food systems. Spinach naturally contains vitamins A, C, K, and folate, as well as minerals such as iron, potassium, and magnesium. It also offers dietary fiber and plant-based antioxidants. These attributes make it useful in applications where both color and natural vegetable components are desired.
The powder integrates well into smoothies, snacks, seasonings, soups, baked goods, sauces, and nutritional blends. It is frequently incorporated into formulations that require the characteristic taste of spinach or a natural green shade, and it performs well in both savory and functional food applications.

title: Spirulina Powder
desc:
This fine, deep green powder is naturally rich in protein, essential minerals, vitamins, and characteristic pigments such as phycocyanin and chlorophyll. Its clean-label profile and plant-based origin make it suitable for a wide range of vegan and wellness-oriented applications.
Spirulina powder blends easily into dry and liquid formulations, offering both nutritional value and natural green coloration. It is commonly incorporated into health drinks, supplements, and functional foods where ingredient purity, consistency, and visual appeal are important.

title: Stevia Powder
desc:
Produced from carefully processed stevia leaf extracts, this fine, white powder delivers clean, consistent sweetness without contributing calories or affecting blood glucose levels. Its high sweetness intensity allows effective usage at very low dosage levels, making it both economical and formulation-friendly.
Stevia Powder offers excellent solubility and stability, making it suitable for a wide range of dry and liquid applications. As a natural, food-grade ingredient, it supports clean-label product development across food, beverage, nutraceutical, and wellness segments.

title: Strawberry Powder
desc:
Strawberry Powder has long been used across food and beverage applications for its appealing flavor, aroma, and visual impact. The powder contains nutrient components naturally present in strawberries—including vitamin C, calcium, vitamin K, potassium, manganese, fiber, and various antioxidants—which are known to contribute to the fruit’s overall nutritional profile.
Its sweet berry notes, fragrant aroma, and reddish color make it a versatile ingredient for adding both flavor and visual appeal to finished products.

title: Sugarcane Instant Drink Powder
desc:
This instant beverage powder reconstitutes easily in cold water to deliver an authentic sugarcane juice experience anytime, anywhere. Naturally rich in carbohydrates, it provides quick energy and a refreshing taste, making it suitable for daily consumption, travel, and on-the-go hydration.
Designed for ease of use and consistent quality, Sugarcane Instant Drink Powder is ideal for home consumption as well as hotels, food services, and beverage premix applications. Its clean-label formulation ensures a natural and enjoyable instant juice experience.
Mix 15–20 g of Sugarcane Instant Drink Powder in 200–250 ml of cold water. Stir well and enjoy.

title: Sugarcane Juice Powder
desc:
Sugarcane Juice Powder is known for providing components naturally present in sugarcane, including minerals, B-vitamins, and antioxidant compounds. These nutrients contribute to the traditional nutritional profile associated with sugarcane juice.
Its light cream color, characteristic aroma, and high purity make it suitable for use in a wide range of formulations where a clean, consistent sugarcane flavor and natural sweetness are desired.

title: Sweet Potato Powder
desc:
Naturally mild and slightly sweet, sweet potato powder provides a balanced flavor profile along with dietary fiber, vitamins, and naturally occurring antioxidants. Its characteristic orange to yellow hue makes it suitable for applications where both color and flavor enhancement are desired.
The powder exhibits good solubility and blending performance, allowing easy incorporation into dry mixes, batters, and liquid systems. Its clean-label nature and plant-based origin make it suitable for bakery products, baby foods, functional formulations, and modern health-focused applications.

title: Tamarind Powder
desc:
Tamarind Powder is valued as a versatile souring agent and flavoring ingredient, especially in cuisines where tangy or balanced flavor notes are essential. Its fine texture, solubility, and concentrated acidity make it a practical alternative to fresh tamarind pulp in both dry mixes and ready-to-cook products.
The powder enhances sauces, spice blends, marinades, instant mixes, snack seasonings, beverages, and culinary preparations requiring tamarind’s signature sharpness. Its stable flavor profile supports consistent batches, making it ideal for commercial and industrial food processing.

title: Tomato Powder
desc:
Tomato Powder delivers the characteristic taste, aroma, and deep red hue of tomatoes in a convenient, versatile form. It allows manufacturers and formulators to incorporate tomato flavor without handling fresh produce or managing short shelf life and seasonal variation.
It is commonly used to enrich soups, sauces, spice blends, instant foods, dry mixes, seasoning masalas, and ready-to-cook formulations. Tomato powder disperses well, provides consistent flavor strength, and can also be reconstituted to create tomato paste as needed.

title: Unripe Banana Powder
desc:
Unripe banana powder is naturally rich in resistant starch and dietary fiber, which makes it a valued ingredient in health foods and wellness formulations. Its mild flavor allows it to be incorporated without altering taste, while its functional properties support texture, binding, and consistency in finished products.
The powder offers excellent thickening and stabilizing characteristics, making it useful across bakery, baby food, and traditional food preparations. Its gluten-free nature and nutritional profile have also contributed to its growing use in specialized diets and processed food formulations.

title: Unripe Papaya Powder
desc:
Unripe papaya powder is naturally rich in papain enzyme, dietary fiber, and antioxidants, making it a valued ingredient in digestive health and enzyme-based formulations. Papain is widely recognized for its role in supporting digestion and protein breakdown, contributing to the powder’s functional versatility.
In addition to nutritional applications, the powder is commonly used as a natural meat tenderizer due to its enzymatic properties. Its fine, free-flowing nature allows for easy incorporation into food processing, nutraceutical, and herbal preparations without significantly affecting taste or texture.

title: Vanilla Powder
desc:
This spray-dried vanilla powder offers a smooth, well-rounded vanilla aroma and flavour that blends effortlessly into dry formulations. Its fine, free-flowing nature ensures easy handling, accurate dosing, and uniform dispersion across a wide range of food and beverage applications.
Engineered for commercial food manufacturing, the powder provides consistent flavour performance across batches while maintaining excellent stability during storage. Its versatility makes it suitable for both sweet and neutral bases, supporting clean and reliable flavour delivery in diverse formulations.

title: Vinegar Powder
desc:
Vinegar Powder is produced by spray-drying liquid vinegar onto suitable carriers to create a free-flowing powder that delivers concentrated taste, color, and aroma without added moisture.
It has the familiar tangy, sour profile of liquid vinegar with a subtle hint of sweetness and can be reconstituted with water when needed. While it is not a significant source of vitamins, minerals, or fiber, its primary value lies in its bold flavor contribution and ease of use across dry food applications.

title: Watermelon Powder
desc:
Spray-dried watermelon powder provides the typical sweetness and refreshing fruit notes associated with fresh watermelon, while offering convenient handling and storage. It incorporates nutrients and antioxidant compounds inherent to watermelon, contributing to its natural appeal across food and beverage applications.
General wellness attributes commonly linked with watermelon—such as its hydration-associated benefits and its naturally occurring lycopene and vitamins—are maintained in powdered form. The powder is water-soluble and suitable for both flavor and coloration needs in formulations.

title: Yogurt Powder
desc:
The spray-drying process results in a fine, free-flowing powder with excellent solubility and consistent quality. Its natural yogurt profile makes it ideal for applications where authentic dairy flavor and mild acidity are required without the handling challenges of fresh yogurt.
Yogurt powder blends easily into both dry and liquid foods, and gives fantastic results with beverages, seasonings, snack coatings, bakery products, and instant dairy mixes. Its stability and ease of use make it a preferred ingredient for commercial food manufacturing and culinary applications.
